finding: Multifocal Black Dots on T2 + T2* GRE

differentials.name: Multiple vascular malformations
differentials.raw: Multiple vascular malformations (capillary telangiectasia, cavernous malformation)

differentials.name: CADASIL
differentials.raw: CADASIL (= cerebral autosomal dominant arteriopathy with subcortical infarcts and leukoencephalopathy)

context: =  "blooming" susceptibility artifacts on T2* GRE (a)  Hemorrhagic micrometastases (b)  Metallic microemboli from artificial heart valves (c)  Microhemorrhages from fat emboli
